sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Compare by hash
before_by_hash = {}
for n in before['nodes']:
    before_by_hash.setdefault(n['hash'], []).append(n)

after_by_hash = {}
for n in after['nodes']:
    after_by_hash.setdefault(n['hash'], []).append(n)

print("Hashes in before only:", set(before_by_hash.keys()) - set(after_by_hash.keys()))
print("Hashes in after only:", set(after_by_hash.keys()) - set(before_by_hash.keys()))

# Check pixel changes for shared hashes
print("\nPixel changes for shared hashes:")
for h in set(before_by_hash.keys()) & set(after_by_hash.keys()):
    bn = before_by_hash[h][0]
    an = after_by_hash[h][0]
    if bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
        print(f"  hash={h} color={bn['color']} {bn['pixels']} -> {an['pixels']}")

# List all after nodes compactly
print("\nAfter nodes (small):")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 200:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} px={n['pixels']} bound={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
